title: Tiny Item Counters
description: Scales down item stack counters to be less visually intrusive.
body:
# Tiny Item Counters
**Tiny Item Counters** is a client-side mod that makes item stack numbers smaller and easier to read in the hotbar and inventory.
The mod scales the count text based on your GUI scale so it stays clear at any size, including Auto. It can also scale down item durability bars, disabled by default. Each of these features can be enabled/disabled in the config.

- Client-side only
- Supports Minecraft 1.21-1.21.11
- Requires Fabric Loader and Fabric API

**This mod does nothing on GUI scale 1, there are no extra pixels to scale down with cleanly.**

**Feedback is appreciated! https://discord.gg/mgnDWPbZFb**
